response.justification: Bogdan has solid senior-level full-stack experience, a current Staff title at re:cinq with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, and prior work on high-throughput micro-services at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic. However, the resume centers on TypeScript/Node.js and DLang rather than the required strong Python, and there is limited evidence of large-scale distributed systems ownership, on-call rotations, or cross-functional stakeholder leadership at Staff scale. The AI-native exposure is recent but promising, warranting a screening conversation rather than an outright pass.
strengths: Current Staff role with hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generator experience
Prior high-throughput micro-services work handling millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby
Strong software craftsmanship discipline — TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and active community teaching
concerns: No demonstrated strong Python proficiency listed in skills or employment history
Limited explicit evidence of distributed-systems architecture ownership and on-call/incident response at Staff scale
Stakeholder management and technical-strategy leadership across product/leadership not clearly evidenced
